hero.name: Alex Mercer
hero.title: Product Designer
hero.subtitle: I design digital products that are simple, thoughtful, and built to last. Currently based in Berlin, available worldwide.

about.title: Designing with purpose since 2017
about.description:
I'm a product designer with 7+ years of experience crafting interfaces for startups and scale-ups. I believe great design is invisible — it just works.

My approach combines user research, clean aesthetics, and systems thinking. I've worked with teams at Spotify, Klarna, and several YC-backed startups.

When I'm not designing, you'll find me photographing architecture, reading about typography, or brewing pour-over coffee.
